# CloudSync

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CloudSync;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CloudSync { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
synchronize, synchronise, refresh, reconnect, transfer, backup, storage, upload, download, connection, network, data

## Categories
arrows, files
